languages.text: "Этот позывной дарован мне инквизитором аф Иррамоном. Элана Неколеблющаяся была истинной мученицей, которая погибла, оставаясь твердой в вере. Она учит, что нельзя сомневаться в свете Его даже в самый темный час, ибо всегда есть беда страшнее той, что вокруг, и Имперское Кредо — единственное, на что может уповать человек".

"Inquisitor af Irramon furnished me with this call sign. Elana the Unshaken was a true martyr who perished while remaining steadfast in her faith. She teaches that one must never doubt His light even in the darkest hour, for there is always a disaster more terrible, and the Imperial Creed is the only thing a person can rely on."
languages.original_text: "Этот позывной дарован мне инквизитором аф Иррамоном. Элана Неколеблющаяся была истинной мученицей, которая погибла, оставаясь твердой в вере. Она учит, что нельзя сомневаться в свете Его даже в самый темный час, ибо всегда есть беда страшнее той, что вокруг, и Имперское Кредо — единственное, на что может уповать человек".

She teaches that one must never doubt His light even in the darkest hour, for there is always a disaster more terrible, and the Imperial Creed is the only thing a person can rely on."

languages.text: «El Inquisidor af Irramon me otorgó este código. Elana la Inquebrantable fue una verdadera mártir que murió sin abandonar la fe. Nos enseña que nunca debemos dudar de Su luz, ni siquiera en los momentos más oscuros, pues siempre hay un desastre más terrible y el Credo imperial es lo único en lo que podemos confiar».
languages.original_text: "Inquisitor af Irramon furnished me with this call sign. Elana the Unshaken was a true martyr who perished while remaining steadfast in her faith. She teaches that one must never doubt His light even in the darkest hour, for there is always a disaster more terrible, and the Imperial Creed is the only thing a person can rely on."

traits.locale_text: «El Inquisidor af Irramon me otorgó este código. Elana la Inquebrantable fue una verdadera mártir que murió sin abandonar la fe. Nos enseña que nunca debemos dudar de Su luz, ni siquiera en los momentos más oscuros, pues siempre hay un desastre más terrible y el Credo imperial es lo único en lo que podemos confiar».

languages.text: “这个代号是审判官阿夫·伊拉蒙给我取的。‘不动摇者埃拉娜’是一位真正的殉道者，她的信仰至死都未动分毫。她教导我们，即使在最黑暗的时刻，也绝不可怀疑祂的光芒，因为总会有更可怕的灾难降临，而帝国信仰是人唯一可以依靠的东西。”
languages.original_text: "Inquisitor af Irramon furnished me with this call sign. Elana the Unshaken was a true martyr who perished while remaining steadfast in her faith. She teaches that one must never doubt His light even in the darkest hour, for there is always a disaster more terrible, and the Imperial Creed is the only thing a person can rely on."

traits.locale_text: “这个代号是审判官阿夫·伊拉蒙给我取的。‘不动摇者埃拉娜’是一位真正的殉道者，她的信仰至死都未动分毫。她教导我们，即使在最黑暗的时刻，也绝不可怀疑祂的光芒，因为总会有更可怕的灾难降临，而帝国信仰是人唯一可以依靠的东西。”

languages.text: « C'est l'inquisiteur af Irramon qui m'a attribué ce nom de code. Elana l'Inébranlable a véritablement existé, c'était une martyre qui a péri sans renier sa foi un seul instant. Elle nous enseigne qu'il ne faut jamais douter de Sa lumière, même dans nos heures les plus sombres, car sur nous pèse en permanence la menace d'un désastre encore plus grand, et le Credo Impérial est la seule chose sur laquelle on puisse compter. »
languages.original_text: "Inquisitor af Irramon furnished me with this call sign. Elana the Unshaken was a true martyr who perished while remaining steadfast in her faith. She teaches that one must never doubt His light even in the darkest hour, for there is always a disaster more terrible, and the Imperial Creed is the only thing a person can rely on."

traits.locale_text: « C'est l'inquisiteur af Irramon qui m'a attribué ce nom de code. Elana l'Inébranlable a véritablement existé, c'était une martyre qui a péri sans renier sa foi un seul instant. Elle nous enseigne qu'il ne faut jamais douter de Sa lumière, même dans nos heures les plus sombres, car sur nous pèse en permanence la menace d'un désastre encore plus grand, et le Credo Impérial est la seule chose sur laquelle on puisse compter. »

languages.text: "Engizisyoncu af İrramon bana bu kod adını verdi. Sarsılmaz Elana, inancında sarsılmaz kalırken can veren gerçek bir şehitti. En karanlık saatte bile O'nun ışığından asla şüphe edilmemesi gerektiğini öğretir çünkü her zaman daha korkunç bir felaket vardır. Bu durumda insanın güvenebileceği tek şey, İmparatorluk İtikadı'dır."
languages.original_text: "Inquisitor af Irramon furnished me with this call sign. Elana the Unshaken was a true martyr who perished while remaining steadfast in her faith. She teaches that one must never doubt His light even in the darkest hour, for there is always a disaster more terrible, and the Imperial Creed is the only thing a person can rely on."

traits.locale_text: "Engizisyoncu af İrramon bana bu kod adını verdi. Sarsılmaz Elana, inancında sarsılmaz kalırken can veren gerçek bir şehitti. En karanlık saatte bile O'nun ışığından asla şüphe edilmemesi gerektiğini öğretir çünkü her zaman daha korkunç bir felaket vardır. Bu durumda insanın güvenebileceği tek şey, İmparatorluk İtikadı'dır."

languages.text: "Inquisitor af Irramon hat mir dieses Rufzeichen zugeteilt. Elana die Unerschütterliche war eine echte Märtyrerin, die standhaft im Glauben starb. Sie lehrt uns, dass man selbst in der dunkelsten Stunde nie an Seinem Licht zweifeln darf, denn es gibt immer eine noch schlimmere Katastrophe, und man kann sich allein auf den Imperialen Glauben verlassen."
languages.original_text: "Inquisitor af Irramon furnished me with this call sign. Elana the Unshaken was a true martyr who perished while remaining steadfast in her faith. She teaches that one must never doubt His light even in the darkest hour, for there is always a disaster more terrible, and the Imperial Creed is the only thing a person can rely on."

traits.locale_text: "Inquisitor af Irramon hat mir dieses Rufzeichen zugeteilt. Elana die Unerschütterliche war eine echte Märtyrerin, die standhaft im Glauben starb. Sie lehrt uns, dass man selbst in der dunkelsten Stunde nie an Seinem Licht zweifeln darf, denn es gibt immer eine noch schlimmere Katastrophe, und man kann sich allein auf den Imperialen Glauben verlassen."

languages.text: 「このコールサインは、イラモンの審問官から与えられたものだ。揺るぎないエレーナは、信仰を貫き、殉教した真の聖人だ。彼女は、どんなに暗闇に包まれても、神の光を疑ってはならないと説いている。なぜなら、常により恐ろしい災難が訪れるからだ。そして、帝国の教義こそが、人々が頼れる唯一のものなのだ。」
languages.original_text: "Inquisitor af Irramon furnished me with this call sign. Elana the Unshaken was a true martyr who perished while remaining steadfast in her faith. She teaches that one must never doubt His light even in the darkest hour, for there is always a disaster more terrible, and the Imperial Creed is the only thing a person can rely on."

traits.locale_text: 「このコールサインは、イラモンの審問官から与えられたものだ。揺るぎないエレーナは、信仰を貫き、殉教した真の聖人だ。彼女は、どんなに暗闇に包まれても、神の光を疑ってはならないと説いている。なぜなら、常により恐ろしい災難が訪れるからだ。そして、帝国の教義こそが、人々が頼れる唯一のものなのだ。」
